---
title: "My Resume"
format: html
---

{{< pdf files/Namratha_K_Resume.docx (3).pdf width=100% height=800 >}}

# Namratha Kothapalli

📍 San Diego, CA
📧 nkothapalli@ucsd.edu
🔗 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/namratha202/) | [GitHub](https://github.com/namratha121)

---

## Summary

Business Analytics graduate student skilled in SQL, Python, and Tableau, with experience in data analysis and predictive modeling. Interested in marketing analytics, business analytics, and data analytics roles.

---

## Education

**Master of Science, Business Analytics**
University of California, San Diego — *GPA: 3.8/4.0* (Expected Dec 2026)
Relevant Coursework: SQL, Python, Gen AI, Marketing Analytics, Consumer Analytics & AI

**Bachelor of Technology, Electronics & Communications Engineering**
RNSIT, Bangalore — *GPA: 3.7/4.0* (May 2023)

---

## Experience

**Market Research Analyst — SunBreak**
Feb 2025 – Present
- Conducted data-driven market analysis on solar load shifting adoption using TAM/SAM/SOM modeling
- Performed customer segmentation to inform go-to-market strategy and pricing decisions

**ServiceNow Business Analyst — Ralph Lauren**
Dec 2023 – Jul 2025
- Automated workflows using ServiceNow, improving operational efficiency by 20%
- Built dashboards to track KPIs (ticket volume, resolution time, SLA compliance)
- Improved resolution time by 25% while maintaining 95%+ SLA adherence
- Collaborated cross-functionally to translate business needs into technical solutions

---

## Skills

**Programming & Tools**
- SQL (joins, window functions, CTEs)
- Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn)
- Tableau, Docker, AWS (S3, EC2), GitHub

**Analytics & Business**
- Data Storytelling, Dashboarding, KPI Tracking
- Market Analysis, Segmentation, A/B Testing
- Predictive Modeling, Regression, Classification
- ETL, EDA, Statistical Analysis

---

## Projects

**Telecom Customer Churn & CLV Optimization | Python**
- Built churn models on 1M+ records and designed top-decile risk targeting strategy
- Identified retention actions generating $1M+ projected long-term profit

**Ad Campaign Uplift & Propensity Modeling | Python**
- Modeled customer response using experimental data
- Projected ~$51K incremental profit through optimized targeting

**Marketing Analytics & Predictive Modeling (Intuit QuickBooks Upgrade) | Python**
- Built logistic regression and neural network models on 75K customers
- Scaled predictions to 800K+ customers to estimate lift and optimize campaign targeting

**User Behavior & Churn Dashboard | Tableau**
- Built dashboard for user engagement and churn insights
- Delivered recommendations to improve retention

**ETL & SQL Data Integration in Snowflake | SQL**
- Built ETL pipelines integrating 40+ datasets
- Enabled analysis of supplier performance and transaction trends
---

## Leadership

**Director — Rady Data Analytics Club (Marketing & Communications)**
Oct 2025 – Present
- Organized and promoted workshops using data-driven marketing strategies
- Increased engagement through content optimization and feedback analysis

**VP — Cultural Activity Team (Marketing)**
Aug 2020 – May 2023
- Led marketing for large-scale events (5,000+ attendees)
- Used data insights to refine campaigns and improve engagement by 30%

---
